--- title: "Publications & News" description: News features and peer-reviewed publications from the FEWsLab team. preview: images/lab/caitlin_grady.jpg toc: true toc-location: left execute: echo: false message: false warning: false --- ::: {.cell} ::: ### News and Blog Posts - Sachi Nandurkar published our [preprint](https://zenodo.org/records/19500205) and [dashboard](https://formula-one-netzero.fewslab.org/) showcasing how we drive to survive climate goals in Formula One. - Sindhu Ranganth and Sachi Nandurkar published a NIST Technical Note on a Systematic Literature Review of Life Cycle Assessments of Large Format Batteries. [DOI 10.6028/NIST.TN.2370](https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/TechnicalNotes/NIST.TN.2370.pdf) - Check out our new White Paper surveying the [food aid ecosystem](https://globalfoodinstitute.gwu.edu/sites/g/files/zaxdzs5956/files/2025-11/gfi-2526-194-gfi-white-paper-oct2025-web-optimized.pdf) in collaboration with the [Global Food Institute](https://globalfoodinstitute.gwu.edu/). - Dr. Grady was quoted in a [All Things Considered](https://www.npr.org/2025/07/04/nx-s1-5454884/why-hydropower-faces-more-barriers-than-wind-or-solar) story. - Dr. Grady was quoted in a Law360 analysis of [What The Feds’ Colo. River Plan Could Mean For The West](https://www.law360.com/articles/1597564/what-the-feds-colo-river-plan-could-mean-for-the-west). - Dr. Grady was quoted in a [Marketplace report](https://www.marketplace.org/2022/08/18/how-drought-zaps-electricity-production-and-drives-up-prices/) on how drought could zap electricity production and raise prices. - Dr. Grady and PhD student Lauren Dennis co-authored an article on [climate change and hydropower for The Conversation](https://theconversation.com/hydropowers-future-is-clouded-by-droughts-floods-and-climate-change-its-also-essential-to-the-us-electric-grid-182314). - Dr. Grady and Lauren Dennis were [interviewed on WORT](https://www.wortfm.org/how-hydropower-impacts-the-electric-grid/) about how hydropower impacts the electric grid. --- ### Featured Journal and Technical Articles - Ranganath, S., J. Kneifel, S. Nandurkar, C.Grady. *Systematic Literature Review: Life Cycle Assessments of Large Format Batteries*. NIST Technical Note. [DOI 10.6028/NIST.TN.2370](https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/TechnicalNotes/NIST.TN.2370.pdf) - Dennis, L. & C. Grady. *Hydroclimate risk to electric balancing throughout the U.S.*. Environmental Research: Infrastructure & Sustainability, 2024. [DOI 10.1088/2634-4505/ad92a5](https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.1088/2634-4505/ad92a5/meta) - Hinojos, S. et al. *Social and Environmental Vulnerability to Flooding*. Applied Geography, 2023. [https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apgeog.2023.103017](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apgeog.2023.103017) - Gomez, M. and C. Grady. *A balancing act: the interplay of food supply chain resilience and environmental sustainability in American cities.* Environmental Research Letters. [DOI 10.1088/1748-9326/ad0608](https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.1088/1748-9326/ad0608/meta) - Grady, C. et al. *When Smart Systems Fail: The Ethics of Cyber-Physical Critical Infrastructure Risk*. IEEE Transactions on Technology and Society, 2021. [PDF](https://blogs.gwu.edu/caitlin-grady/files/2021/02/Grady_IEEETSS_2021.pdf) - Gomez, M. et al. *Fragility of a Multilayer Network of Intranational Supply Chains*. Applied Network Science, 2020. [https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s41109-020-00310-1](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s41109-020-00310-1) - Mohammadpour, P. et al. *Food, Energy, Water Security in Ecuador, Bolivia, and Peru*. Environmental Science & Policy, 2019. [https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envsci.2019.08.014](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envsci.2019.08.014) - Mahjabin, T. et al. *Water Footprint Efficiency Across the US*. PLOS ONE, 2018. [https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0202301](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0202301) - Grady, C. et al. *Social Network Analysis for International Development Project Selection*. Expert Systems with Applications, 2015. [http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0957417415001463?via%3Dihub](http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0957417415001463?via%3Dihub) --- ### Google Scholar Profiles *For full details on publications see the following Google Scholar profiles* - [Caitlin Grady](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=HoSryoQAAAAJ&hl=en) - [Sindhu Ranganath](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=484KNOwAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) - [Dhanyasri Bolla](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=MLKXs6MAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) - [Sachi Nandurkar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ac04pksAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) - Abbey Kollar - Bryce Huffman - Tarun Kumanduri Past Team Members - [Selena Hinojos](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=40i20T4AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) - [Michael Gomez](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ClC7U1QAAAAJ&hl=en) - [Paniz Mohammadpour](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=8r0FciwAAAAJ&hl=en) - [Lauren Dennis](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=t9saXqQAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) - [Sarah Torhan](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=9aVOsfIAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) - [Tasnuva Mahjabin](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=9TcDoEIAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) - [Luis Delgado](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Ho-7wskAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=sra) --- ### Peer-Reviewed Books & Chapters - Younos, T. and C. Grady, eds. 2014. *Potable Water: Emerging Global Problems and Solutions*. Springer. [Link](http://www.springer.com/us/book/9783319065625) - Grady, C. et al. 2014. *Global Potable Water: Current Status, Critical Problems and Future Perspectives*. In: *Potable Water*. Springer. - Younos, T. and C. Grady, eds. 2013. *Climate Change in Water Resources*. Springer. [Link](http://www.springer.com/la/book/9783642375859) ---
